description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Ubuntu versions and LLVM versions. For each job, checkout the repository, detect package metadata, login to ghcr.io, build, test, and package the project using devcontainers/ci, and then publish the package to Cloudsmith if the CLOUDSMITH_API_KEY is set.
